textByHashes.acd64605fe51d72d2b0f8abdd235f0996eaad2dc: Tetamo! This is a total disaster!
textByHashes.a7edbf90e591cc7e03715e505d240c9c08a47d1a: Yes! I don't know where they came from, but my basement is filled with them! At best, they're stealing all my things, but at worst, they're just destroying them!
textByHashes.9f0877b6a781a9561948db04035a7fc0cdbe9fc0: Thank you for the offer, but I don't think so.
